name: Checkbox
description: Toggles a single on/off value — settings, terms acceptance, opt-ins. API mirrors industry convention (Astryx CheckboxInput): checked, unchecked, and indeterminate are prop-driven appearance states. v2.0.0 (breaking, DOM shape): the control is a NATIVE input[type=checkbox] inside the wrapping label — checked/indeterminate are DOM state, not ARIA on a button; the box and glyphs are presentational.

props.name: value
props.description: Checked, unchecked, or indeterminate (partial selection in a group).

props.name: label
props.description: Always rendered — users must know what they are toggling.

events.description: Fires when the input is toggled; uncontrolled instances flip unchecked/checked (indeterminate resolves to checked).
